subcodes.first_line: O Rahman! The All-Merciful hath come from the heaven of Command with majesty and sovereignty. Verily, We have hearkened unto the call of the sincere ones [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا رحمن قد اتی الرحمن من سماء الامر بعظمه و سلطان انا سمعنا ندآء المخلصین
subcodes.subjects: @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
